title: ilex jenmanii
intro: Ilex jenmanii, also known as the Jenman's holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, native to the island of Dominica in the Caribbean. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex jenmanii are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
